name: Bunny Patch Dessert
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 Ounces frozen pound cake, thawed, cut into 10 slices
8 Ounces COOL WHIP Whipped Topping, thawed
Jelly beans and assorted Easter decorations
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 12x8-inch baking dish with cake slices.
2. Top with pie filling and all of the whipped topping.
3. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until ready to serve.
4. Tint coconut pale green using food coloring.
5. Sprinkle over the center of the whipped topping.
6. Decorate with Easter candies and decorations.
Makes 15 servings.
